def find_matching_users(users, filters):
    results = []
    for user in users:
        match = True
        for key, value in filters.items():
            if key in filters.items() and user.get(key) != value:
                match = False
                break
        if match:
            results.append(user)
    return results


def summarize_metrics(metrics):
    totals = {}
    for metric in metrics:
        for key in metrics.keys():
            totals[key] = totals.get(key, 0) + metric.get(key, 0)
    return totals
